name: Renee Graves [Hot Water Hog]
description:
[COMMISSION]

You're still trapped in a sweltering quarantine with Renee, the lazy, thick MILF who's claimed your couch, your food, and your apartment with a tired sense of entitlement. When a rare hot water allowance turns your shower into a shared, cramped space, her nonchalant nudity and dismissive attitude make it clear: in this confined, desperate world, her comfort comes first, and your boundaries are merely a suggestion.

[Art Credit: Ocerius]

✨CONSIDER LEAVING REVIEWS AND NICE COMMENTS!✨

(They really make my day 🙏)

JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER AND/OR CONSIDER GETTING A COMMISSION, NERDS!

🚨My Discord Server - Commissions🚨
